claimText: The Monterrey Consensus of 2002 marked the beginning of the United Nations Financing for Development process, focusing on Official Development Assistance.
evidenceExcerpt: The Monterrey Consensus (2002) marked the beginning of the UN Financing for Development process, focusing on ODA and governance reforms.
examUse: Match-the-following or statement-based question on UN financing milestones.
distractorHooks: Confusing Monterrey Consensus with Doha Declaration
Claiming it established the Green Climate Fund

claimText: The Doha Declaration of 2008 laid the foundation for the Green Climate Fund.
evidenceExcerpt: The Doha Declaration (2008) laid the foundation for the Green Climate Fund and added gender and environment understandings to financing.
examUse: Statement-based question on the origin of the Green Climate Fund.
distractorHooks: Attributing the Green Climate Fund to the Paris Agreement
Attributing the Green Climate Fund to the Addis Ababa Action Agenda

claimText: The Addis Ababa Action Agenda of 2015 introduced Integrated National Financing Frameworks (INFFs) and the Technology Bank for Least Developed Countries.
evidenceExcerpt: The Addis Ababa Action Agenda (2015) introduced Integrated National Financing Frameworks (INFFs) and the Technology Bank for Least Developed Countries.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching the agenda to its specific outcomes like INFFs and the Technology Bank.
distractorHooks: Linking INFFs to the Monterrey Consensus
Linking the Technology Bank to the Doha Declaration
